## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check`, `npm run build`, `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` all pass locally (see CONTRIBUTING.md for full commands)
- [ ] Parser/accounting changes include tests with **synthetic** fixtures (no real session data)
- [ ] Rust wire-struct changes are mirrored in `src/lib/types.ts`
- [ ] Docs updated if contracts or behavior changed (`docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `AGENTS.md`)
